sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n51943" key="kaqufe/ths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">καθυφ-έτης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n51943.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">praevaricator</tr_>, ib.</sense> </entryFree>
